title: melicope lunu-ankenda
intro: Melicope lunu-ankenda, also known as the Ceylon tea tree or wild orange, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Melicope lunu-ankenda include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Melicope lunu-ankenda include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
